name: Garlic Extract
summary: Decision-ready summary: Garlic Extract is best framed for blood pressure support; LDL/cholesterol context; cardiovascular risk-factor support; safety screen: anticoagulants; planned surgery; bleeding disorder.
description: Garlic Extract supports blood pressure; cholesterol; cardiovascular with high confidence in this merged decision layer.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
contraindications: Bleeding disorders or upcoming surgery due to antiplatelet effects -- discontinue at least two weeks before surgery per anesthesiology guidance
anticoagulant or antiplatelet medications such as warfarin or DOACs or aspirin or clopidogrel due to additive bleeding risk
antihypertensive medications due to additive blood-pressure-lowering effects
HIV protease inhibitors such as saquinavir may become less effective
antidiabetic medications due to additive hypoglycemia risk.
